most_positive.title: $NVDA I promised to do a number re-crunch of yesterday when I said what Mr. Juang said about him seeing this company being a 3 to 4 trillion dollar company by 2030 in an interview. I said yesterday that would almost or at least it should make this price target cross 1,000 almost twice with the associated 10 to one splits twice and while I type it and it sounds wonderful when I type it I am going to re-crunch and assume that it grows to 2 trillion by 2030 which in my mind is just going against the CEO because he gets where his company is headed. I guess throwing out a whole trillion dollars is my speculative way of crunching a conservative estimate. I love how my calculator doesn't do trillions as well as my iphone calculator. Your alright Apple even though you are a struggle sometimes. Yes, Siri you can go ahead and tell me a joke. Siri uh huh? Tell me a joke. Where the stock price has been for two years with Nvda is a joke am I right? Yes Siri you are right. Time to crunch it.
$NVDA that sucks for you and your family.  Hope you have a good bankruptcy lawyer.  All the best and hope you get back on your feet
